name: Kotak White Reserve Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: No transactional rewards (Earns White Pass value on milestones only)

domestic: Unlimited domestic lounge access for primary and add-on cardholders.
international: Unlimited international lounge access via Priority Pass for primary and add-on cardholders.

renewalBenefitsValued.label: Complimentary Club Marriott membership (worth Rs 15,000) on card renewal

milestones.label: Earn ₹5,000 White Pass value on spending ₹3 Lakhs
Earn ₹15,000 White Pass value on spending ₹10 Lakhs
Earn ₹22,000 White Pass value on spending ₹20 Lakhs
Earn ₹24,000 White Pass value on spending ₹30 Lakhs
Earn ₹26,000 White Pass value on spending ₹40 Lakhs
Earn ₹28,000 White Pass value on spending ₹50 Lakhs
Earn ₹63,000 White Pass value on spending ₹75 Lakhs
Earn ₹67,000 White Pass value on spending ₹1 Crore

additionalBenefits: 2 Free golf rounds each month at select courses worldwide for the primary cardholder
Luxury lifestyle concierge and assistance services
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹7,500 (max ₹4,500 per calendar year)
additionalDetails: White Pass value can be redeemed at a 1:1 ratio (1 White Pass = ₹1.0) on the Kotak Rewards portal for brand vouchers, flights, and hotel bookings.
White Pass value can also be redeemed as statement credit to pay off the card bill at a rate of 1 White Pass = ₹0.70.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Premium brand e-vouchers via Kotak Rewards
Flight & hotel bookings via Kotak Rewards

salaried: Subject to Kotak Mahindra Bank premium segment criteria
selfEmployed: Subject to Kotak Mahindra Bank premium segment criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.

White Pass value can be redeemed at 1 White Pass = Rs 1.0 on vouchers, flights, and hotels, and Rs 0.70 for statement cashback. Guest charges for lounges are $35 per guest per visit. Customer can hold only one active White/White Reserve card.
